mnemonics: First-Order Rules are based on a set of IF-THEN statements.
Consider a Rule like: IF (X) THEN (Y)
keyPoints: Definition of First-Order Rules: A set of IF-THEN statements with one variable per statement.
Properties of First-Order Rules: Deterministic, Compositional, and Hierarchical.
Example of First-Order Rule: IF (Age > 18) THEN (you are an adult).
